## Removes light scratches, holograms & surface defects

The Menzerna car detailing Medium Cut Foam Pad Yellow removes scratches, sanding marks and surface defects in combination with Menzerna Medium Cut polishes. The special composition of the foam mixture ensures a perfect cut and produces a brilliant gloss.

**Features & Benefits:**

- Removes light scratches, holograms & surface defects
- High-gloss finish
- Washable
- Consistent, long-lasting foam
- Safety edge
- High-quality Velcro
- Convenient to use

**Sizes: 95mm & 150mm**

# Medium Cut Foam Pad 95mm Yellow Menzerna Premium

- Brand: Menzerna
- Product Code: PS415507
- Availability: 80

## Price: £7.16 (Ex Tax: £5.97)

Product Images:
- https://www.thepolishingshop.co.uk/image/cache/catalog/product/MenzPads/smallyellow-500x500.jpg
- https://www.thepolishingshop.co.uk/image/cache/catalog/product/MenzPads/padholderyellow-500x500.jpg

## Description

Medium Cut Foam Pad
Premium polishing pad for fine abrasive polishes

Foam Pad for use with medium-cut abrasive polishes. Removes slight scratches, holograms, and surface imperfections in combination with Menzerna Medium Cut polishes. The unique foam formulation delivers the perfect cut and generates shine.

Accessories

### Processing

- Rotary
- Orbital
- With Hand Polishing Applicator

# Soft Cut Foam Pad

## Premium polishing pad for high-gloss polishes

Polishing pad for use with soft high-gloss polishes. Removes holograms and shadows – and prevents clouding – when used in combination with Menzerna Finish polishes. The specially configured polishing foam reliably enhances the performance of Menzerna Finishes. Guarantees brilliant deep shine and a perfect show-car finish.

Accessories

### Processing

- Rotary
- Orbital
- With Hand Polishing Applicator

### Volumes

| 95mm/ 3,5" | 26909.099.001
| 150mm/ 6" | 26900.224.012
| 180mm/ 7" | 26903.099.001

### Optimised for

- Final Finish 3000
- Super Finish 3500
- Super Finish Plus 3800

Product Images:
- https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/_processed_/1/3/csm_Polierpad_weich_fuer_leichte_Kratzer_1100x1100_0eadecc5d5.jpg
- https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Zubehoer/Produktbilder/Polierwerkzeug/Produkte_freigestellt/menzerna_SoftCut.png
- https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/26900.224.012/rotation01.jpg

## Benefits

- Tailored to Menzerna Finish Cut polishes
- Polishing pad is washable
- Durable, long-lasting foam (approx. 20 vehicles can be polished)
- Safety edge
- High-quality velcro
- Straightforward application

## Downloads

- Technical datasheet Soft Cut Foam Pad (119.10 KB): https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Technische_Datenblaetter/Zubehoer/EN/TDB_4_Soft_Cut_Foam_Pad_EN_09.2021.pdf

## FAQ - Questions & answers

**What kind of polishing pads are available?**
Polishing pads are generally divided into foam pads, microfiber pads, and lambswool polishing pads. Menzerna offers foam polishing pads in various degrees of hardness as well as a variety of lambswool pads for orbital and rotary polishing machines. Polishing pads come in different sizes.

**How much polish should be applied to the polishing pad?**
Recommendation for Menzerna polishes and a surface measuring 40 cm x 40 cm:
- Pad with a diameter of 95 mm: 3 to 4 pea-sized drops
- Pad with a diameter of 150 mm: 5 pea-sized drops
- Pad with a diameter of 180 mm: 6 to 7 pea-sized drops

**How many cars can I polish with the Menzerna pads?**
Approximately 20 cars can be polished with Menzerna's premium pads. However, the polishing pads need to be thoroughly cleaned.

**Which pads should I use for Menzerna polishes?**
Menzerna's premium pads are color-coordinated with the polish labels. The recommended polishing accessories can be found on each product's detail page on our website.

**What are the options for cleaning a polishing pad?**
Foam polishing pads can be washed by hand with clear water. Alternatively, a bucket may also be used. Please note: Lambswool polishing pads should never be rinsed with water. Instead, they should be cleaned with a lambswool brush or an air blow gun.

## Additional Description (German)

Bestes Schaumstoff Polierpad für die Anwendung mit unseren Glanzpolituren. Perfekt abgestimmt auf die Menzerna Finish Polituren. Unterstützt die Glanzerzeugung und poliert Hologramme und Swirls schnell und zuverlässig aus dem Autolack. Das langlebige Polierpad ist für rotative und exzentrische Poliermaschinen geeignet.
